# pheno-context

> Canonical request context for the pheno-* fleet. Builder pattern
> for request metadata (`request_id`, `span_id`, `trace_id`,
> `user_id`, `org_id`, free-form `metadata` bag), plus a
> `from_headers` extractor that pulls known `X-*` HTTP headers into
> a `Context`.

## Public API

```rust
use http::HeaderMap;
use pheno_context::{Context, ContextBuilder, ContextError};

#[derive(Clone, Debug, PartialEq)]
pub struct Context {
    pub request_id: String,
    pub span_id: String,
    pub trace_id: String,
    pub user_id: Option<String>,
    pub org_id: Option<String>,
    pub metadata: std::collections::HashMap<String, String>,
}

#[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)]
pub enum ContextError {
    #[error("missing header: {0}")]
    MissingHeader(String),
}

impl Context {
    pub fn new() -> ContextBuilder;
    pub fn from_headers(headers: &HeaderMap) -> Result<Self, ContextError>;
}

impl ContextBuilder {
    pub fn with_request_id(self, id: impl Into<String>) -> Self;
    pub fn with_span_id(self, id: impl Into<String>) -> Self;
    pub fn with_trace_id(self, id: impl Into<String>) -> Self;
    pub fn with_user_id(self, id: impl Into<String>) -> Self;
    pub fn with_org_id(self, id: impl Into<String>) -> Self;
    pub fn with_metadata(self, k: impl Into<String>, v: impl Into<String>) -> Self;
    pub fn build(self) -> Result<Context, ContextError>;
}
```

## Quickstart

```toml
# Cargo.toml
[dependencies]
pheno-context = "0.1"
http = "1"
```

```rust
use pheno_context::Context;
let ctx = Context::new()
    .with_request_id("req-1").with_span_id("s-1").with_trace_id("t-1")
    .with_user_id("u-1").with_org_id("o-1").build()?;
```

## Conventions

- Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`).
- rustfmt + clippy (`-D warnings`); `#![warn(missing_docs)]` on the
  public API.
- 80% lib coverage gate (ADR-040); pair with `llvm-cov.toml` + a
  `coverage` job in `.github/workflows/ci.yml` when adding CI.
- `thiserror` for error types; no `unwrap()` in the public API.
- Required HTTP headers consumed by `from_headers`:
  `X-Request-ID`, `X-Trace-ID`, `X-Span-ID`. Optional: `X-User-ID`,
  `X-Org-ID`. Missing required → `ContextError::MissingHeader`.
- The `metadata` bag is `HashMap<String, String>`; iteration order
  is non-deterministic (use a sorted view for observability).
- Standalone crate (empty `[workspace]` table in `Cargo.toml`); not
  a member of the root monorepo workspace.

## See also

- `src/lib.rs` — full type definitions, header-extraction rules,
  `Display` impl, and inline tests.
- `tests/lib_test.rs` and `tests/async_propagation_test.rs` — public
  API + async propagation coverage.
- `examples/quickstart.rs` — minimal builder + header extraction.
- `AGENTS.md` — agent context.
- `WORKLOG.md` — change history (v2.1 schema).
- `CHANGELOG.md` — release notes.
- `LICENSE-MIT` — MIT license.
- Sibling: `pheno-config` (typed config), `pheno-errors` (canonical
  `AppError`), `pheno-flags` (feature flags).
